name: Rescued Chimpanzees of the Congo with Jane Goodall
original_name: Rescued Chimpanzees of the Congo with Jane Goodall
overview: Dr Jane Goodall and her team rescue and help chimpanzees in danger and elaborate on the beautiful bond that one can create with animals, providing a remarkable window into humankind's closest living relatives. Discover Dr Jane Goodall's journey to create Tchimpounga, the largest chimpanzee sanctuary in Africa, and follow the rehabilitation of a cast of orphaned chimpanzees.

trailers.title: Rescued Chimpanzees of the Congo with Jane Goodall - Trailer | CuriosityStream
